# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS CloudFormation template for SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup for serverless event processing.

Resources:
  MyServerlessEventSQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MyServerlessEventProcessingQueue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600 # 4 days in seconds (default is 4 days)
      VisibilityTimeout: 30 # 30 seconds (default is 30 seconds)
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ServerlessEventProcessing
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

  MyServerlessEventSNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: MyServerlessEventProcessingTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ServerlessEventProcessing
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

  MyServerlessEventSQSQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MyServerlessEventSQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt MyServerlessEventSQSQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref MyServerlessEventSNSTopic

  MyServerlessEventSNSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt MyServerlessEventSQSQueue.Arn
      TopicArn: !Ref MyServerlessEventSNSTopic

Outputs:
  SQSQueueURL:
    Description: The URL of the SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref MyServerlessEventSQSQueue
    Export:
      Name: MyServerlessEventSQSQueueURL

  SQSQueueARN:
    Description: The ARN of the SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt MyServerlessEventSQSQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: MyServerlessEventSQSQueueARN

  SNSTopicARN:
    Description: The ARN of the SNS Topic
    Value: !Ref MyServerlessEventSNSTopic
    Export:
      Name: MyServerlessEventSNSTopicARN

  SNSTopicName:
    Description: The Name of the SNS Topic
    Value: !GetAtt MyServerlessEventSNSTopic.TopicName
    Export:
      Name: MyServerlessEventSNSTopicName
